docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $787.77 FILED BY BROWN, JOEL AS TO DEFENDANT WHITFIELD, JACQUES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, JOEL AS TO DEFENDANT WHITFIELD, JACQUES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-02-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WHITFIELD, JACQUES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2011 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, JOEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITFIELD, JACQUES $787.77 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $827.77, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
